name: Sour Butter Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 can butter beans (the larger ones, also called Lima beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the onion, garlic, and chili in a little water or olive oil.
2. Add the base and stalks of the broccoli (everything except the florets) and the zucchini. Cook until all ingredients are softened.
3. Stir in the tomatoes and herbs. Simmer (covered) for 15 minutes.
4. In a blender, combine the butter beans, stock, soy milk, yogurt, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until smooth.
5. Add the bean mixture to the pot and simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Stir in the corn and enough tomato puree to adjust the color if desired.
7. Serve on its own or with macaroni-style pasta.
